policy_note: Per-file 90% line coverage floor. Two transports live under `src/transport/` — the QUIC scaffolding (ADR-0010) and the HTTP/3 wrapper (ADR-0019). Generated proto code is re-exported through `lib.rs` and llvm-cov excludes it via the workspace `target/` filter. New files must hit 90% on first commit; the h3.rs debt baseline below covers async-shutdown error branches inside spawned tasks (peer-graceful-close, body-cap > 64 MiB, spawned-task tracing on connection error) that are genuinely hard to exercise without invasive test infrastructure. Raise toward 90 over time; do not ratchet down.
